home.title: Lost Garden - Poetic Dark Fantasy Anime
home.description: Poetic dark fantasy anime by Frank Houbre. A hollow knight, a mysterious child, and a world beneath the earth. Be ready for Episode One on 2 June 2026.

experience.title: Episode One — early access
experience.description: Sign up for Lost Garden Episode One. The watch link is emailed on 2 June 2026; explore early previews until premiere.

vision.title: Vision | Lost Garden
vision.description: Frank Houbre on Lost Garden: Sol, Rose, a wounded underground world, and how AI helps turn a clear artistic vision into images, animation, and sound.

legalNotice.title: Legal Notice | Lost Garden
legalNotice.description: Legal information for the Lost Garden website.

privacy.description: How Lost Garden collects and uses your data, cookies, Firebase auth, and your GDPR rights.

hero.tagline: Some things wake beneath the earth. A hollow knight. A child in the mist. A forest that remembers.
hero.signupLine: Create a free account and the watch link will land in your inbox when the first episode drops.
hero.footerLine: Not every guardian was meant to protect.

characters.title: Characters
characters.subtitle: In the caverns beneath the world, even broken things remember how to protect.

list.name: Sol
list.tagline: An empty knight with a lantern-shaped head, no body, no voice, and a duty he does not understand.
list.description: Sol is not a legendary warrior. He is damaged, awkward, and strangely innocent, an old armor awakened in the depths of a blue cavern. He cannot truly speak. Only hollow metallic sounds, creaks, groans, and quiet gestures reveal what he feels. Yet when danger comes, he places himself between Rose and the world.

list.name: Rose
list.tagline: A quiet child whose presence makes life return where nothing should grow.
list.description: Rose is small, calm, and almost unreal. She walks through ruined places with a strange serenity, as if she can hear what the world has forgotten. Around her, flowers bloom, roots move, and the dead earth sometimes remembers how to breathe. But Rose is not a weapon, not a miracle to spend, and not a symbol. She is a child.

list.name: The Sleeping Machines
list.tagline: Colossal mechanical-organic beings, half dead, half dreaming beneath moss and roots.
list.description: Long after the old catastrophe, the machines still lie buried in the blue forests. Their bodies are rusted, cracked, and covered in fungi, but some eyes still open in the dark. They do not hate. They do not forgive. They awaken like forgotten disasters.

list.name: The Masked Pilgrims
list.tagline: Figures in black hoods and white masks, carrying strange rituals through the mist.
list.description: Seen only from afar, they move through the cavern platforms in silent processions. Their gongs echo across the abyss. Nobody knows if they are guardians, mourners, or something older. Their presence means the depths are not empty.

experience.notesLead: Production diary fragments. More will appear as the caverns open.

timeline.title: The Oath
timeline.line: Words spoken where no one listens.

timeline.title: The Awakening
timeline.line: Metal opens its eyes without a face.

timeline.title: The Blue Forest
timeline.line: Mushrooms lit paths no sun ever touched.

timeline.title: The Eye in the Dark
timeline.line: A giant remembers it is awake.

timeline.title: The Child in the Lilies
timeline.line: White petals find her in the mist.

previews.title: The Blue Forest
previews.text: A forest without sky. Bioluminescent mushrooms, pale flowers, and roots that drink the dark.

previews.title: Sol & Rose
previews.text: An empty armor and a quiet child, one made to obey, one who should have been protected.

previews.title: Sleeping Machines
previews.text: Colossal organic relics, half-buried in moss. Some eyes still open when the mist moves.

experience.previewImageAlt: The Blue Forest, glowing mushrooms and mist beneath the earth
experience.premiereCardLine: The watch link will be emailed to you on premiere day.
